## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/M_pbyAyZUqZawXHgzJqoKFszH8H9rjmt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content program showing positive results: organic search traffic doubled since October](https://fathom.video/share/M_pbyAyZUqZawXHgzJqoKFszH8H9rjmt?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Focus areas: LLM evals, agents, metrics; considering increasing content volume](https://fathom.video/share/M_pbyAyZUqZawXHgzJqoKFszH8H9rjmt?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Exploring options to double down on successful strategies: refreshes, new topics, link building](https://fathom.video/share/M_pbyAyZUqZawXHgzJqoKFszH8H9rjmt?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Website refresh coming soon; new ebook focused on LLMs as CTA in development](https://fathom.video/share/M_pbyAyZUqZawXHgzJqoKFszH8H9rjmt?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Performance and Strategy
